RimVore2.QuirkPoolDef.label: implant
RimVore2.QuirkPoolDef.description: These quirks are added by implants. They modify the pawn's performance in vore mechanics, such as nutrition gain from prey, digestion speed, and mobility.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: digestion adjuster
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: An implant-derived quirk that enhances predation efficiency at the cost of mobility. As a predator, the pawn gains 2.5x nutrition from prey and digests them at 2x speed, suffers less 20% reduction in movement capacity.
